Description: The cancellation deadline is inconsistent across artifacts.
The reminder channel is inconsistent between elicited requirement intent and the recorded decision.
The exact timing for reminder delivery has not been decided, but the requirement and acceptance criterion remain underspecified.
Staff access requirements assume all staff may view and update appointment records, while the elicitation states only authorized staff should have access.

The requirement that compliance must confirm the staff access policy before release is captured in elicitation and the decision log but is not represented in the requirements, backlog, or acceptance criteria.
Evidence: T6; D4; absence in R1-R10; absence in B1-B6; absence in AC1-AC8

Description: Timezone handling for appointment times is raised during elicitation but is not specified in the downstream artifacts.
Evidence: T8; R7; absence in R1-R10; absence in B1-B6; absence in AC1-AC8; absence in D1-D4

Description: The requirement that appointment details should be shown to both staff and patients is only partially traced; downstream artifacts specify storage of details but do not fully carry the display requirement for both user groups.
Evidence: T8; R7; partial coverage in AC5; absence in B1-B6; absence in AC1-AC8

Description: No stakeholder artifact after elicitation confirms or resolves the security officer’s access-control concern beyond noting a pending compliance confirmation.
